SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 100205457) TO PLAINTIFF SPOTON TRANSACT, LLC
DECLARATION OF DAVID GILMORE (TRANSACTION ID # 100216030) FILED BY DEFENDANT CURRY, RICHARD RWC ELITE GROUP LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DOING BUSINESS AS CBTC

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RE: DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: OFF CALENDAR. THE GILMORE DECLARATION FAILS TO SHOW THAT THE PARTIES MET AND CONFERRED "IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41(A). THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH THE CODE. DEFENDANTS' RESPONSE TO THE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY DECEMBER 15, 2023. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

Off Calendar Apr-10-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF SPOTON TRANSACT, LLC's MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff and cross-defendant SpotOn Transact, LLC's motion to compel arbitration is denied.

Order signed (see signed order/ word minutes for complete ruling.)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Off Calendar Nov-27-2023 Continued To Feb-07-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-15-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Defendant's DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Off calendar. The Gilmore declaration fails to show that the parties met and conferred "in person or by telephone" in compliance with CCP 430.41(a). The parties are ordered to comply with the code. Defendants' response to the amended complaint is now due by December 15, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)
